(ULONG_PTR)((PUCHAR)(RootDirectory) + (ULONG_PTR)((Entry)->NameOffset)) : (Entry)->Id) ULONG_PTR LdrNameOrIdFromResourceEntry( PIMAGE_RESOURCE_DIRECTORY ResourceDirectory, PIMAGE_RESOURCE_DIRECTORY_ENTRY Entry) { if (Entry->NameIsString) return (ULONG_PTR)((PUCHAR)(ResourceDirectory) + (ULONG_PTR)(Entry->NameOffset)); else return (ULONG_PTR)(Entry->Id); } NTSTATUS

prototypes.name: NtQueryDefaultLocale
prototypes.returnType: ULONGLONG NtGetTickCount64( VOID ) { ULARGE_INTEGER tickCount; tickCount.QuadPart = USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountQuad; while (TRUE) { tickCount.HighPart = (ULONG)USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCount.High1Time; tickCount.LowPart = USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCount.LowPart; if (tickCount.HighPart == (ULONG)USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCount.High2Time) break; YieldProcessor(); } return (UInt32x32To64(tickCount.LowPart, USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountMultiplier) >> 24) + (UInt32x32To64(tickCount.HighPart, USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountMultiplier) << 8); } ULONG NtGetTickCount( VOID ) { return (ULONG)((USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountQuad * USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountMultiplier) >> 24); ULARGE_INTEGER tickCount; while (TRUE) { tickCount.HighPart = (ULONG)USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCount.High1Time; tickCount.LowPart = USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCount.LowPart; if (tickCount.HighPart == (ULONG)USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCount.High2Time) break; YieldProcessor(); } return (ULONG)((UInt32x32To64(tickCount.LowPart, USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountMultiplier) >> 24) + UInt32x32To64((tickCount.HighPart << 8) & 0xffffffff, USER_SHARED_DATA->TickCountMultiplier)); } NTSTATUS

prototypes.name: RtlAreAllAccessesGranted
prototypes.returnType: BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlAreAllAccessesGranted( ACCESS_MASK GrantedAccess, ACCESS_MASK DesiredAccess ) { return (~GrantedAccess & DesiredAccess) == 0; } BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlAreAnyAccessesGranted( ACCESS_MASK GrantedAccess, ACCESS_MASK DesiredAccess ) { return (GrantedAccess & DesiredAccess) != 0; } BOOLEAN

prototypes.name: RtlCopyLuid
prototypes.returnType: BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlIsEqualLuid( PLUID L1, PLUID L2 ) { return L1->LowPart == L2->LowPart && L1->HighPart == L2->HighPart; } BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlIsZeroLuid( PLUID L1 ) { return (L1->LowPart | L1->HighPart) == 0; } LUID NTAPI_INLINE RtlConvertLongToLuid( LONG Long ) { LUID tempLuid; tempLuid.LowPart = Long; tempLuid.HighPart = 0; return tempLuid; } LUID NTAPI_INLINE RtlConvertUlongToLuid( ULONG Ulong ) { LUID tempLuid; tempLuid.LowPart = Ulong; tempLuid.HighPart = 0; return tempLuid; } LONGLONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlConvertLuidToLonglong( LUID Luid ) { LARGE_INTEGER tempLi; tempLi.LowPart = Luid.LowPart; tempLi.HighPart = Luid.HighPart; return tempLi.QuadPart; } ULONGLONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlConvertLuidToUlonglong( LUID Luid ) { ULARGE_INTEGER tempLi; tempLi.LowPart = Luid.LowPart; tempLi.HighPart = Luid.HighPart; return tempLi.QuadPart; } VOID

prototypes.name: RtlCreateHashTable
prototypes.returnType: VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitHashTableContext( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE_CONTEXT Context ) { Context->ChainHead = NULL; Context->PrevLinkage = NULL; } VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitHashTableContextFromEnumerator( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE_CONTEXT Context, PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE_ENUMERATOR Enumerator ) { Context->ChainHead = Enumerator->ChainHead; Context->PrevLinkage = Enumerator->HashEntry.Linkage.Blink; } VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlReleaseHashTableContext( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE_CONTEXT Context ) { UNREFERENCED_PARAMETER(Context); return; } ULONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlTotalBucketsHashTable( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE HashTable ) { return HashTable->TableSize; } ULONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlNonEmptyBucketsHashTable( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE HashTable ) { return HashTable->NonEmptyBuckets; } ULONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlEmptyBucketsHashTable( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE HashTable ) { return HashTable->TableSize - HashTable->NonEmptyBuckets; } ULONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlTotalEntriesHashTable( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE HashTable ) { return HashTable->NumEntries; } ULONG NTAPI_INLINE RtlActiveEnumeratorsHashTable( PRTL_DYNAMIC_HASH_TABLE HashTable ) { return HashTable->NumEnumerators; } BOOLEAN

prototypes.name: RtlDebugPrintTimes
prototypes.returnType: BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlIsAnyDebuggerPresent( VOID ) { BOOLEAN result; result = NtCurrentPeb()->BeingDebugged; if (!result) return USER_SHARED_DATA->KdDebuggerEnabled; return result; } NTSTATUS

prototypes.name: RtlFindUnicodeSubstring
prototypes.returnType: VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlSanitizeUnicodeStringPadding( PUNICODE_STRING String ) { ULONG PaddingSize; ULONG PaddingStart; PaddingStart = FIELD_OFFSET(UNICODE_STRING, MaximumLength) + sizeof(String->MaximumLength); PaddingSize = FIELD_OFFSET(UNICODE_STRING, Buffer) - PaddingStart; memset((PCH)String + PaddingStart, 0, PaddingSize); UNREFERENCED_PARAMETER(String); } PWCHAR

prototypes.name: RtlInitAnsiString
prototypes.returnType: VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitAnsiString( PANSI_STRING DestinationString, PCSTR SourceString ) { if (SourceString) DestinationString->MaximumLength = (DestinationString->Length = (USHORT)strlen(SourceString)) + sizeof(ANSI_NULL); else DestinationString->MaximumLength = DestinationString->Length = 0; DestinationString->Buffer = (PCHAR)SourceString; } VOID

prototypes.name: RtlInitString
prototypes.returnType: (AnsiString->Buffer, ) (AnsiString->Length, ) (AnsiString->MaximumLength, ) VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitEmptyAnsiString( PANSI_STRING AnsiString, __drv_aliasesMem PCHAR Buffer, USHORT MaximumLength ) { memset(AnsiString, 0, sizeof(ANSI_STRING)); AnsiString->MaximumLength = MaximumLength; AnsiString->Buffer = Buffer; } VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitString( PSTRING DestinationString, PCSTR SourceString ) { if (SourceString) DestinationString->MaximumLength = (DestinationString->Length = (USHORT)strlen(SourceString)) + sizeof(ANSI_NULL); else DestinationString->MaximumLength = DestinationString->Length = 0; DestinationString->Buffer = (PCHAR)SourceString; } VOID

prototypes.name: RtlInitUnicodeString
prototypes.returnType: BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlIsNullOrEmptyUnicodeString( PCUNICODE_STRING String ) { return !String || String->Length == 0; } (DestinationString->Buffer, ) (DestinationString->Length, ) (DestinationString->MaximumLength, ) VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitEmptyUnicodeString( PUNICODE_STRING DestinationString, __drv_aliasesMem PWCHAR Buffer, USHORT MaximumLength ) { memset(DestinationString, 0, sizeof(UNICODE_STRING)); DestinationString->MaximumLength = MaximumLength; DestinationString->Buffer = Buffer; } VOID NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitUnicodeString( PUNICODE_STRING DestinationString, PCWSTR SourceString ) { if (SourceString) DestinationString->MaximumLength = (DestinationString->Length = (USHORT)(wcslen(SourceString) * sizeof(WCHAR))) + sizeof(UNICODE_NULL); else DestinationString->MaximumLength = DestinationString->Length = 0; DestinationString->Buffer = (PWCH)SourceString; } VOID

prototypes.name: RtlInitUnicodeStringEx
prototypes.returnType: NTSTATUS NTAPI_INLINE RtlInitUnicodeStringEx( PUNICODE_STRING DestinationString, PCWSTR SourceString ) { size_t stringLength; DestinationString->Length = 0; DestinationString->Buffer = (PWCH)SourceString; if (!SourceString) return STATUS_SUCCESS; stringLength = wcslen(SourceString); if (stringLength <= UNICODE_STRING_MAX_CHARS - 1) { DestinationString->Length = (USHORT)stringLength * sizeof(WCHAR); DestinationString->MaximumLength = DestinationString->Length + sizeof(UNICODE_NULL); return STATUS_SUCCESS; } return STATUS_NAME_TOO_LONG; } NTSTATUS

prototypes.name: RtlNumberOfClearBits
prototypes.returnType: BOOLEAN NTAPI_INLINE RtlCheckBit( PRTL_BITMAP BitMapHeader, ULONG BitPosition ) { return BitTest64((LONG64 const *)BitMapHeader->Buffer, (LONG64)BitPosition); return (((PLONG)BitMapHeader->Buffer)[BitPosition / 32] >> (BitPosition % 32)) & 0x1; } ULONG

prototypes.name: RtlWow64GetThreadContext
prototypes.returnType: NTSTATUS NTAPI_INLINE RtlWow64GetThreadContext( HANDLE ThreadHandle, PWOW64_CONTEXT ThreadContext ) { return NtQueryInformationThread( ThreadHandle, ThreadWow64Context, ThreadContext, sizeof(WOW64_CONTEXT), NULL ); } NTSTATUS

prototypes.name: RtlWow64SetThreadContext
prototypes.returnType: NTSTATUS NTAPI_INLINE RtlWow64SetThreadContext( HANDLE ThreadHandle, PWOW64_CONTEXT ThreadContext ) { return NtSetInformationThread( ThreadHandle, ThreadWow64Context, ThreadContext, sizeof(WOW64_CONTEXT) ); } NTSTATUS
